title: Dart Frog Testing Concepts
description: Test your understanding of Dart Frog route testing.

questions.explanation: The dart_frog_test package provides specialized testing utilities for Dart Frog routes, including route() and testRoute().
questions.question: Which package provides testing utilities for Dart Frog routes?

options: It mocks the HTTP request and response
It tests only the route handler function
questions.explanation: testRoute() creates a mocked HTTP environment where you can define request properties and verify response behavior without starting a real server.
questions.question: What does testRoute() do in dart_frog_test?

questions.explanation: The body() method returns a Future<String>, so you need to await it before comparing. The completion() matcher from async is also valid but less common.
questions.question: How do you assert on the response body in a Dart Frog test?

questions.explanation: You can fully customize the mock request including headers, query parameters, and body using the RequestContext from testRoute().
questions.question: What can you customize when creating a test request in dart_frog_test?
